'''âh-ch-k-dh''' ('''kahachkedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:embarge|embarge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ch-k-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:embarge|embarge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-ch-k-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kahachkedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihachkedhoko|thihachkedhoko]] || [[word:jihachkedhoko|jihachkedhoko]] || [[word:shihachkedhoko|shihachkedhoko]] || [[word:kihachkedhoko|kihachkedhoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
